feedback.text: There are many entities in the software and entertainment industry who believe they have the right to remotely delete a purchased product from a customer's inventory. Moreover, it is often the same companies that make a purchased product unusable because they frame the product as a service or subscription and then just shutdown the servers associated with the product. They do not commit to informing the customer that their "service" is on a borrowed time and one day will be terminated. Both of those practices are unacceptable and must be regulated.
